scripts.test:public-privacy: rm -rf .tmp-test-build && tsc src/index.ts src/ui.ts --module esnext --moduleResolution bundler --target es2022 --types @cloudflare/workers-types --lib es2022 --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-test-build --noEmit false && node --test tests/public-privacy.test.mjs tests/ui-layout.test.mjs && rm -rf .tmp-test-build
